title: Rangola Lyrics Ghajini

Rangola Lyrics Ghajini

Rangola hola hola
penne neethaano
unnai muththamittu
otti konda vannam
naanthaano

ho Rangola hola hola
rasaa neethaano
unnai muththamittu
otti konda vannam
naanthaano

komala valli valli
kangalaal kollum villi.
thiumbi naan nikkasolli
vachividavaa malli.

kaathavarayaa raayaa
malli poo venaam poyaa
malaiya vaangi thaayaa
enna nee tholumel
thookki poyaa

penne neethaano
unnai muththamittu
otti konda vannam
naanthaano

ho Rangola hola hola

unnai muththamittu

naanthaano

oh.. nila nila
paradhu vaayen
ulaginai marandhu vaayen.
azhaginai nerungi vaayen
alai alaiyaai.

thodaamale anaikkuraane
thadaalenu izhukkuraane

adaavadiyaa

naan oruthalara unakulla
una manandhida
udaikkavaa villa.

kurunkadal pola
kodhikkuthu aasa

ye iduppula kuzhunguthu

kaigala thottu

naanthaano

azhagazhagaa

un manakatti vandi meedhu
naan menakettu
yaerum podhu

thada thada vendru
thada thada vendru
izhuthavan neethaane.

naan sadugu aadum podhu
nee thodugira ellai kodu
vidu vidu endru
pada pada vendru
parandhaval neethaane.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Rangola?

Rangola expresses the joy and excitement of love, inviting listeners to celebrate their feelings through dance.

How does Rangola fit into the plot of Ghajini?

The song captures a light-hearted moment in Ghajini, showcasing the protagonist's romantic side amidst the film's intense narrative.

Who are the artists behind Rangola?

The details about the singer, lyricist, and music director for Rangola remain unknown.

When was Rangola released?

Rangola was released on December 25, 2008, as part of the Ghajini soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Rangola, the vibrant energy of love is beautifully portrayed through lively beats and catchy lyrics. The song serves as a delightful interlude in Ghajini, where the characters express their affection in a playful manner. It evokes feelings of joy and celebration, making it perfect for festive occasions. The upbeat tempo encourages listeners to dance and revel in the moment, encapsulating the essence of youthful romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rangola from Ghajini is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, perfectly encapsulating the essence of youthful romance. The infectious beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere that invites everyone to dance along. This song is a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits and celebrate life!
stanzaMeanings: Rangola, oh girl, is it you? I have embraced you and taken on your color.
Oh Rangola, oh girl, is it you? I have embraced you and taken on your color.
The beautiful vine, with eyes that can capture, I will speak softly and come back again.
Oh beloved, I don't want to lose you, I will bring the flowers, and you will take them away.
Rangola, oh girl, is it you? I have embraced you and taken on your color.
Oh Rangola, oh girl, is it you? I have embraced you and taken on your color.
Oh.. the moon, I forget the world as I look at you. I look at your beauty and it creates waves.
Without hesitation, I will show everything, I will not hide anything, I will reveal it all.
I am not someone who can be easily broken by you.
Like the sea, I am filled with desires, come slowly.
In this position, the pain is unbearable, it is a sin to take it away.
Touching with hands, I will make it worthwhile, I will hold on tightly.
Oh Rangola, oh girl, is it you? I have embraced you and taken on your color.
Youth is passing by, stealing the heart, capturing the soul, is it all good?
Oh, the one who is like a bud, is smiling beautifully, is blooming beautifully.
When I come to your heart, I will rise above everything.
You are the one who says 'stop, stop' and pulls me back.
When I dance, you are the one who says 'let go, let go' and flies away.
Rangola, oh girl, is it you? I have embraced you and taken on your color.
Oh Rangola, oh girl, is it you? I have embraced you and taken on your color.
The beautiful vine, with eyes that can capture, I will speak softly and come back again.
Oh beloved, I don't want to lose you, I will bring the flowers, and you will take them away.
